title: Build Palettes from Purpose, Not Formulas
summary: Build and verify css color relationships in heat-relief service palette critique through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css color relationships from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css color relationships without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the heat-relief service palette critique case · theory

content.text: Hue, saturation or chroma, lightness, and warm or cool associations can support grouping and tone. Analogous, complementary, split-complementary, triadic, and monochromatic relationships are exploration tools, not guarantees of hierarchy, taste, contrast, cultural meaning, or usability. Functional roles and user testing decide whether a palette succeeds. Apply it to heat-relief service palette critique.
